Log \#11  
Prompt: Take this application and make the following changes: Change the name of the slot machine so it fits within the scheme of slot machines and not Token Furnace. Ensure that the Guide implemented at the beginning can actually be closed or has a set timer until it closes. Also, make it so you can reopen the Guide at any time by having a button somewhere on the side. Make sure the Guide follows the layout of the current theme set for the slot machine.

Observations:   
**🎯 Main Changes (Iteration 11\)**

### **🏷️ Branding**

* **Renamed game**  
  * *Token Furnace 3000 → Lucky Spin Casino*

---

### **🎨 UX / Polish**

* **Result overlay improved**  
  * Clear win/lose/jackpot cards after each spin  
* **Toasts added**  
  * Floating notifications for wins, losses, bonuses

---

### **🧠 Feedback System (Better clarity)**

* More explicit feedback:  
  * “Win \+X”, “Progress hit”, “Try again”  
* Stronger state-based UI (pill \+ overlay sync)

---

### **🎮 Feel / Effects**

* **Haptics (vibration) added**  
* **Panel flash effects** on win/loss  
* **Reel timing \+ stagger refined**

---

### **🪟 Help Modal (Smarter)**

* **Auto-opens on first load \+ auto-closes**

---

### **🎨 Visual Polish**

* Help modal now:  
  * **Theme-aware styling** (colors change per theme)  
* Small layout \+ readability tweaks

---

## **⚡ Net Effect**

* Feels **much more like a real slot machine**  
* Big upgrade in **feedback, polish, and game feel**  
* No major core mechanic changes, just **experience refinement**

Validation: 

No HTML or CSS errors

Visual:   
![][image1]

Improvements: 

* Implement a file dedicated to test cases of every file used outside of itself to ensure that every function works correctly or handles its specific exception errors correctly.   
* For every function, clearly state and elaborate on the purpose, parameters and return values (and what those return values mean in the context of the function) in a comment.   
* Make sure reel contents can be centered between different devices  
* Add another game mode of 5 reels  
* Add more ways to lose progress than the mask icon

New Prompt Brainstorming:   
Take this application and make the following changes: add another game mode where there are 5 reels. Reel contents (emojis) are centered only for Mac, but not for Windows and we want it centered for all devices. Implement a file dedicated to test cases of every file used outside of itself to ensure that every function works correctly or handles its specific exception errors correctly. For every function, clearly state and elaborate on the purpose, parameters, and return values (and what those return values mean in the content of the function) in a comment. Add more ways to lose progress than the mask icon.

[image1]: <data:image/png;base64,>
